title: Paragymnopteris delavayi
taxonomy: Paragymnopteris delavayi is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to China. The genus Paragymnopteris is a part of the order Polypodiales, which is a group of ferns. Paragymnopteris delavayi is further classified into the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the marsh ferns or autumn ferns. The species is closely related to other species in the same genus, such as Paragymnopteris crenulata and Paragymnopteris lanceolata.
